title: Modules, Resolution, Packages, and Declaration Files · Compiler Case: Type Value Imports
summary: Publish a small typed library whose runtime exports, package metadata, and declaration surface agree in clean consumers. Planned artifact: Add and verify the ts type value imports increment in a consumable ESM package with declaration evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Distinguish type-only and value imports and preserve runtime side effects intentionally.
Choose bundler or NodeNext resolution and trace file, extension, package exports, and type lookup decisions.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
